docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY RAMANATHAN, ARJUN AS TO DEFENDANT FRIZZI, GINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-19-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $85.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FRIZZI, GINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF ARJUN RAMANATHAN IS PRESENT WITH PLAINTIFF WITNESS ANANT MARUR. DEFENDANT GINA FRIZZI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY RAMANATHAN, ARJUN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMANATHAN, ARJUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIZZI, GINA $9,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,760.00, PLAINTIFF'S SHARE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IS $4800. DEFENDANT FRIZZI DID NOT APPEAR AND FAILED TO PROVIDE AN ACCOUNTING OF WHY DEDUCTIONS WERE MADE. THUS THE AWARD IS 2X ACTUAL DAMAGES UNDER CCP 1950.5(L) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUGEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIZZI, GINA HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAMANATHAN, ARJUN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-21-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIZZI, GINA

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GINA FRIZZI IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-24-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. THIS CASE WILL BE HEARD TOGETHER WITH THE FOLLOWING CASES: CSM-871445; CSM-871431; AND, CSM-871446. PARTIES AGREED TO THE SERVICE AND WENT TO DEPT. 103 FOR FILING. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ARJUN RAMANATHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GINA FRIZZI IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2026 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO JUL-30-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
